title: Skill Development Priority Matrix Visualization
description: Interactive Chart.js visualization for skill development priority matrix visualization
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
chart.js
learningObjectives: Interpret a bubble chart in which the x-axis encodes development effort, the y-axis encodes frequency of use, and bubble size encodes instance count
Classify visualization types into the four priority quadrants formed by the effort and impact midpoints at 5
Evaluate which MicroSim types to build first by locating high-impact, low-effort items in the Priority 1 quadrant
Distinguish items that still need to be built (red) from those that already exist (green) using the status color encoding
